metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5319
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1: confocal imaging of immunofluorescence labeling for Plexin B1 and PSD-95 (DLG4) in cultured hippocampal neurons showed postsynaptic localization.

Based on the known transmembrane topology of this protein, "integral component of ... membrane" term was selected.. Experimental description: "Hippocampal neurons were cultured as described by Banker and Goslin [2] with modifications. In brief, the hippocampal tissues were dissociated from Sprague-Dawley rat embryos of embryonic day 18 (E18) (SLC),"

antibody:
"Polyclonal antibodies to plexin-B1 were raised by immunizing rabbits with maltose binding protein (MBP)-fused-mouse plexin-B1 (amino acid, 1216-1521, NM_17725). The specificity of the antibodies was confirmed by Western blot analysis."

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
